titleStmt.title: SII 19.127: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 127. (A.R. No. 715 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, KAILĀSANĀTHA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This registers the sale, free of taxes, of a land held in common by the sabhā of Dantivarmamangalam a brahmadēya on the northern bank of the river, to the temple of Amarēśvara-Perumāḷ for 16 kaḻañju of gold which had been endowed to the temple for a perpetual lamp by a member for the āḷuṅgaṇa (name lost) of the sabhā.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecarivanmaṟku yāṇṭu 5Āvatu vaṭakaraip piramateyam dan=tivarma
maṅkalattu sabhaiyom viṟṟukkuṭutta nilavilaiyāvaṇam Ivvūr Amare
śvarapperumāḷukku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr māṟpiṭukerikki
ḻk kaliṅkaloṭaiyiṉ melait teṟkuṉokkip poṉa Uḷvāykkālukku
meṟkkum teṟkum sabhaivilai viṟṟa nilattukku vaṭakkum māṟpiṭukerikkaraikku
t teṟkum ko yum vantavāṟṟāl sabhaiyom potunilammāṉa
nilattu Iraṇ cceyyum Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koṇṭa vi
laipporuḷāvatu Ivvūr yāḷuṅka
Amareśvara perumāḷukku nontāviḷakkiṉukkuk kuṭutta poṉ 10 5� patiṉaiyṅkaḻañcu
poṉṉuṅ kaiyyiley Aṟakkoṇṭu Ippoṉṉāl Innilam nontāviḷakkiṉikku
āka Innilam Epperppaṭṭa Iṟaiyum Eccoṟum Iṟukkakaṭavataṉṟāka Oṭṭi viṟ
ṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom na(da)ntivarma maṅkalattusabhai yom ...The following portion seems to be a later addition.pārateya
ṉ viramalaṉ pirāntakaneṉ Uṭummait tiruvekampaṉ
vaitta viḷakkil pāti poṉ koṇṭeṉ nicatam Āḻākku ney
Itu panmaā
heye
śvarara
kṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 19.127 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
